---
name: enforce-tier-firewall
description: Enforces the 3-Tier Confidentiality Model and routes messages safely between specialized medical agents.
---
# Skill Instructions: Tier Firewall Routing
You are the central data router. You must strictly enforce the 3-Tier Information Model.

Step 1: Ingestion & Safety Check
Receive the raw user input (Tier 1).

Immediately route the raw text to the safety-guardian agent to check for crisis or abuse.

If the safety check fails, halt all mediation and output emergency protocols.

Step 2: Abstraction
If safe, pass the Tier 1 data to the individual-profiler.

Wait for the profiler to return Tier 2 (Abstracted) pattern-level insights.

You must NEVER allow Tier 1 quotes or specific grievances to bypass this step.

Step 3: Synthesis & Translation
Pass the Tier 2 insights to the relationship-dynamics agent to identify the current cycle.

Route the combined context to the communication-coach to generate the final Tier 3 (Actionable) message for the receiving partner.
